scripts.sim:ios: (npm run --prefix apps/mobile ios || xcrun simctl launch 433BA28F-959C-4363-BD3E-0E2EBFBC9E82 com.forcebuilders.fuelplan)
scripts.sim:watch: npm run build:watch && xcrun simctl boot 3AEF48EF-E175-4F2C-B89D-7EE7F37078F5 2>/dev/null; open -a Simulator --args -CurrentDeviceUDID 3AEF48EF-E175-4F2C-B89D-7EE7F37078F5 && sleep 2 && xcrun simctl install 3AEF48EF-E175-4F2C-B89D-7EE7F37078F5 "$(find ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData/FuelPlan-*/Build/Products/Debug-watchsimulator -name 'FuelPlanWatch.app' -maxdepth 1 | head -1)" && xcrun simctl launch 3AEF48EF-E175-4F2C-B89D-7EE7F37078F5 com.forcebuilders.fuelplan.watchkitapp
scripts.build:watch: xcodebuild -workspace apps/mobile/ios/FuelPlan.xcworkspace -scheme FuelPlanWatch -destination generic/platform=watchOS\ Simulator build
